description.en: A large, golden-haired mountain bovid nicknamed the 「Six Dislikes」 for its unusual mix of features.
description.zh: 一种大型金色长毛山地牛科动物，因其奇特的特征组合被戏称为「六不像」。

anatomy.en: Takins look like a mix of a goat and an ox. They have thick golden-yellow fur and horns that sweep backwards.
anatomy.zh: 羚牛看起来像山羊和牛的结合体。它们拥有厚厚的金黄色皮毛，角向后方弯曲。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are social animals that move to higher altitudes in summer. They are surprisingly agile on steep slopes.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是群居动物，夏天会向高海拔移动。它们在陡坡上非常敏捷。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the high-altitude forests and alpine zones of Sichuan, Shaanxi, and Gansu.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 四川、陕西和甘肃高海拔森林及高山地带的特有种。
